corrections.text: The summary and the Overview state that Peregrine's Series C valuation was $2.5 billion "just 15 months earlier" and that the Series D "nearly triples" that valuation, attributing the figures to PR Newswire. None of the cited sources — PR Newswire, the company's own announcement, Pulse 2.0, or the 2024 Forbes profile — reports a prior Series C valuation of $2.5 billion or a 15-month timeframe. That prior-valuation figure and the "nearly triples" comparison are therefore unsupported by the cited sources. The verified facts remain the $250 million Series D raise and the $6.8 billion post-money valuation.
